running_headers_to_strip: CLASS IN CHARITIES AND RELIEF WORK
files.notes: File contains two complete articles. The first is about a Relief Society training course at BYU, the second is a story. There appears to be content from additional articles at the very end (Temple Work poem and beginning of A Testimony) that should be part of subsequent files.
